# claude_federation_rule (Data Source)

Fetches a single Workload Identity Federation rule by its id (`fdrl_...`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "claude_federation_rule" "example" {
  id = "fdrl_01234567890abcdefghijklmn"
}

output "federation_rule_name" {
  value = data.claude_federation_rule.example.name
}

output "federation_rule_issuer_id" {
  value = data.claude_federation_rule.example.issuer_id
}

output "federation_rule_oauth_scope" {
  value = data.claude_federation_rule.example.oauth_scope
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Identifier of the federation rule (`fdrl_...`).

### Read-Only

- `applies_to_all_workspaces` (Boolean) Whether this rule is enabled for every workspace in the org.
- `archived_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the rule was archived, if archived.
- `created_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the rule was created.
- `description` (String) Optional free-text description.
- `issuer_id` (String) Federation issuer (`fdis_...`) whose tokens this rule accepts.
- `issuer_name` (String) Issuer's display name at read time.
- `match` (Attributes) Conditions the verified JWT must satisfy. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--match))
- `name` (String) Slug identifier of the federation rule.
- `oauth_scope` (String) Space-separated OAuth scopes granted on the minted token.
- `target` (Attributes) Identity that tokens minted via this rule act as. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--target))
- `token_lifetime_seconds` (Number) Lifetime in seconds of tokens minted via this rule.
- `type` (String) Object type, always `federation_rule`.
- `updated_at` (String) RFC 3339 timestamp of when the rule was last updated.
- `workspace_id` (String) Workspace (`wrkspc_...`) this rule is primarily associated with.
- `workspace_ids` (List of String) Workspaces this rule is enabled for.

<a id="nestedatt--match"></a>
### Nested Schema for `match`

Read-Only:

- `audience` (String) Exact match against the `aud` claim.
- `claims` (Map of String) Exact-match `{claim: value}` pairs against top-level string claims.
- `condition` (String) CEL expression over the `claims` variable.
- `subject_prefix` (String) Match against the JWT `sub` claim.


<a id="nestedatt--target"></a>
### Nested Schema for `target`

Read-Only:

- `service_account_id` (String) Service account (`svac_...`) to mint tokens for.
- `service_account_name` (String) Service account's display name at read time.
- `type` (String) Target type, always `service_account`.
